column1: # Defines which documents are required at each stage of the process.
# Can be scoped to a specific programme
#   description_de  Short explanation shown to volunteer (German).
#   description_en  Short explanation shown to volunteer (English).
#   required_at     At which stage this document is required:
#                   placement    = required after placement is tentatively confirmed
#   scope           Who must provide this document:
#                   program:<slug>  = only volunteers in this programme
#                   site:<slug>     = only volunteers at this site
#   requested_by    Who can request this document from the volunteer:
#                   admin        = only NGO admin can request
#                   site         = placement site can also request (via admin approval)
#                   site_direct  = site can request directly (no admin approval)
#   max_size_mb     Maximum file size in megabytes.

column4: Warum möchtest du diesen Freiwilligendienst leisten? (min. 300 Wörter)
column5: Why do you want to do this volunteer service? (min. 300 words)

column4: Erweitertes Führungszeugnis (nicht älter als 3 Monate). Beantrage es beim Einwohnermeldeamt.
column5: Extended criminal record check (not older than 3 months).

column4: Ärztliches Attest über Reise- und Einsatztauglichkeit.
column5: Medical certificate confirming fitness for travel and service.

column4: Aktueller Impfnachweis. Anforderungen je nach Einsatzland.
column5: Current vaccination record. Requirements vary by country.

column4: Kopie des gültigen Reisepasses (Haupt- und Datenseite).
column5: Copy of valid passport (main page and data page).

column4: Nachweis der erforderlichen Sprachkenntnisse (z.B. Goethe, DELE, Cambridge).
Nachweis einer gültigen Auslandskrankenversicherung für den Einsatzzeitraum.
column5: Proof of valid international health insurance for the service period.

column4: Detaillierte Beschreibung des Einsatzes (wird von der Einsatzstelle hochgeladen).
column5: Detailed description of the placement (uploaded by the placement site).
